Event: The Underwater Adventure
Event Date: 01/05/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E13
Healing Gift Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, launches a magic orb at the ally with the lowest current health. On hit, the orb restores 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% of the unit's max health and increases physical and magic armor by 19% / 20% / 21% / 23% / 26% / 29% / 35% for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, launches a magic orb at 2 allies with the lowest current health. On hit, the orb restores 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% of the max health and increases physical and magic armor as well as fortitude by 24% / 25% / 26% / 28% / 30% / 34% / 40% for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, launches a magic orb at 3 allies with the lowest current health. On hit, the orb restores 17% / 18% / 19% / 20% / 23% / 26% / 30% of the unit's max health and increases physical and magic armor, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor piercing by 29% / 30% / 31% / 33% / 36% / 40% / 45% for 5 sec.
